productDisplayName: Nike Men Max Air Black Backpacks
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better backpack you can find than this Max Air one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space and a comfortable laptop sleeve, this makes for a great everyday bag to work.Height: 19"Width: 12.5" Depth: 11" Capacity: 39 litresBody made of 87% polyester and 13% nylon, with an inner lining made of 92% nylon and 8% polyesterBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a well padded laptop sleeve and separatorOne front zippered compartment with another zippered compartment over it that has a media pocket and organizer spaceOne vertically zippered compartment on the frontMeshed organizer pouches on the sides to hold a sipperSynthetic haul loop for handling ease Buckle straps on the sidesTarpaulin bottom for waterproofingAdjustable, wide and padded compression straps with a padded back for carrying easenike swoosh printed on the frontCareWipe with a damp cloth when necessary Hand wash onlyLine dry
